# Yohaku Companion v1.8.3

## Highlights

- Live Desk can now publish album artwork for NetEase Cloud Music when current track metadata is available but macOS Now Playing omits the cover.

## Fixes and reliability

- Added strict local queue matching for NetEase artwork enrichment, with official-host validation, HTTPS-only retrieval, bounded image data, and the existing normalized PNG privacy boundary.
- Preserved fail-closed behavior for ambiguous tracks, untrusted cover URLs, and download failures; text Presence remains available when artwork enrichment cannot complete.

## Update notes

- NetEase artwork sharing still requires the Media Playback source, the negotiated `mediaArtwork` capability, and a valid Application Icon Hosting configuration.
